summary: Frontend-only testing of Shaivam Philosophy static website. All 9 pages load correctly with proper titles, navbar, and content. Contact form submission shows success message. Video tabs visible with 5 categories. Root redirect handled via App.js.

integration_issues.issue: Newsletter 'Subscribed!' confirmation not tested due to playwright browser crash on blog.html page load

context_for_next_testing_agent: All pages verified working. Home (Nataraja hero, ॐ Shaivam logo, 5 nav links), About (table found), Videos (5 Bootstrap tabs visible + video cards), Blog (featured post), Post1/Post2/Post3 (all load), Contact (form submit → success message visible). Root / redirects via React App.js window.location.replace. Newsletter test crashed - worth retesting.

pages_tested.index.html: PASS - Title: Shaivam Philosophy — Home, hero section, ॐ Shaivam logo, all nav links present
pages_tested.about.html: PASS - Title correct, Two Domains table found
pages_tested.videos.html: PASS - 5 tabs: Introduction, Deity Archetypes, Temple Tours, Philosophical Discussions, Practical Guidance. Video cards with play buttons visible
pages_tested.blog.html: PASS - Featured article 'Understanding Dual Monism' visible
pages_tested.post1.html: PASS - Understanding Dual Monism article loads
pages_tested.contact.html: PASS - Form submission works, success message shows
